STELLARCOMMODITY
MarketplaceDashboardDocsAbout
Stellar Wave Open-Source Program

Tokenizing Physical
Commodities on Stellar

A production-grade platform for fractional ownership of gold, silver, crude oil, and wheat. Built with Soroban smart contracts for institutional-grade reliability.

Explore Marketplace Read Documentation

Institutional Security

SEP-compliant APIs and audited Soroban contracts.

Instant Settlement

5-second finality with sub-cent transaction costs.

Global Access

Democratizing access to global commodity markets.

Total Value Locked

$142.5M

+12.3% this month

Active Holders

24,812

Across 140 countries

Avg. Settlement

5.2s

Network finality

Transaction Fee

<$0.01

Fixed network cost

Supported Assets

Real-world assets tokenized as Stellar-native assets. Every token is backed 1:1 by physical reserves in regulated vaults.

GLD
+1.2%

Gold

XGLD

$2,342.5per unit

Physical gold bullion, vaulted and audited.

View Details
SLV
-0.5%

Silver

XSLV

$28.45per unit

Fine silver reserves, tokenized for trade.

View Details

+2.4%

Crude Oil

XOIL

$78.12per unit

Brent Crude barrels, fractionalized.

View Details
WHT
-1.1%

Wheat

XWHT

$562per unit

Premium wheat bushels, globally tradable.

View Details

How it Works

Four simple steps to start trading physical commodities on the Stellar blockchain.

01

Connect Wallet

Link your Freighter or Albedo wallet.

02

Pass KYC

Complete a simple verification process.

03

Add Funds

Deposit USDC or XLM into your account.

04

Trade Assets

Buy and sell commodity tokens instantly.

Built with Modern Infrastructure

We use the latest technologies to ensure performance, security, and developer productivity.

Frontend

Next.js 15

App Router & Server Components

Smart Contracts

Soroban

Rust-based WASM contracts

Blockchain

Stellar SDK

Native Horizon integration

Styling

Tailwind v4

Modern CSS engine

Database

Drizzle ORM

Type-safe DB interactions

Auth

Better Auth

Secure session management

Join the Open Source Wave

StellarCommodity is a community-driven project. We have 500+ open issues for contributors. Whether you are a Rust expert or a frontend enthusiast, there is a place for you.

View on GitHub How to Contribute
STELLARCOMMODITY

Tokenizing physical commodities on the Stellar blockchain. Open-source, production-grade infrastructure for the future of finance.
